---
title: "Website Analytics (GA4)"
format: html
---

## Overview

This page summarizes key Google Analytics 4 (GA4) metrics for my portfolio website. The goal is to track user behavior, traffic sources, and engagement patterns to continuously improve user experience and content performance.

---

## Key Metrics

<div style="width: 100%; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto;">
  <iframe
    width="100%"
    height="700"
    src="https://datastudio.google.com/embed/reporting/bf867064-675c-46d7-81fc-7af7a00a96d9/page/6x3xF"
    frameborder="0"
    style="border:0; border-radius: 12px;"
    allowfullscreen
    sandbox="allow-storage-access-by-user-activation allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox">
  </iframe>
</div>

## Key Insights

- The portfolio received **116 28-day active users** and **21 active users** during the reporting period.

- Most traffic came from the **United States**, which accounted for **57.1%** of users.

- Additional traffic came from Canada, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom, while **28.6%** of users were categorized as “not set.”

- User engagement decreased throughout the funnel, with scroll activity dropping to **45.69%** and user engagement dropping to **37.07%**.

- Only **5.17%** of users clicked, suggesting opportunities to improve calls to action, project links, and interactive elements across the site.

- Traffic was concentrated mainly on **Chrome** and **Safari**, so future website testing should prioritize those browsers.
